duty.functionalRole: defines required conduct or restraint under a binding source
duty.existsWhen: a binding governance source places conduct or restraint under requirement before assessment or breach

responsibility.functionalRole: assigns who can be called to account for attributable conduct, omission, role, or outcome
responsibility.existsWhen: conduct, omission, role, or outcome is attributable to an actor and answerability is in question

violation.functionalRole: records that duty-required conduct or conditions are unmet at the relevant assessment point
violation.existsWhen: an applicable duty is in force, the relevant assessment point has been reached, and the actual state fails to satisfy what the duty requires
